title: calophyllum longifolium
intro: Calophyllum longifolium, also known as Calophyllum inophyllum var. longifolium, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Calophyllum longifolium has been found to have health benefits such as wound healing, anti-cancer properties, and cardiovascular protection. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including oil and extract, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
